name: Takisawa Machine Tool Co., Ltd.
summary: Takisawa Machine Tool Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells machine tools in Japan and internationally. Its products include CNC, CNC/manual, engine, and manual lathes, as well as multi-tasking machines, piston machines, and machining centers. The company also offers drill centers, and FA cells and systems, as well as sales support and technical services. Takisawa Machine Tool Co., Ltd. was founded in 1922 and is headquartered in Okayama, Japan.
